zh.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦
zh.lifeSummary: Mary Mayo於大約1661年1月1日出生在英國。她於1681年與Thomas Smith Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1726年3月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年65歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Mayo于大约1661年1月1日出生在英国。她于1681年与Thomas Smith Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1726年3月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年65岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Mayo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mayhew
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the French and Middle English personal name Maheu (Old French Mahieu), a common Norman form of Matthew . Its common Middle English pet form was Maw, by syncope of the medial -he-; see under Maw 1. See also May and Mahy .

History: Thomas Mayhew (1593–1682) came to Medford, MA, from Tisbury, Wiltshire, England, c. 1632, and subsequently moved to Watertown, MA. In 1642 he established a settlement on Martha's Vineyard, with his son Thomas, who was the first English missionary to the Indians of New England.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Mayo was born about 1 January 1661, in England. She married Thomas Smith Sr. in 1681, in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 22 March 1726, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65, and was buried in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Mayo est née environ 1 janvier 1661, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Thomas Smith Sr. en 1681, à Eastham, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mars 1726, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. März 1726 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Mayoは約1661年1月1日にイギリスで生まれた。1681年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーエアスサムでThomas Smith Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1726年3月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで65歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルエアスサムコブ ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.of Eastham, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable: 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Mayo(은)는 대략 1661년 1월 1일 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1681년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬에서 Thomas Smith Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1726년 3월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Mayo nasceu aproximadamente 1 de janeiro de 1661, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Thomas Smith Sr. em 1681, em Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de março de 1726, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Mayo родилась около 1 января 1661 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Smith Sr. в 1681 г. в местности эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 марта 1726 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ков буринг гроунд, эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Mayo nació aproximadamente 1 de enero de 1661, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Thomas Smith Sr. en 1681, en Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1726, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
